name: SYNLOGIC, INC.
summary: Nasdaq Delisting . Nasdaq is expected to file a Form 25 Notification of Delisting with the Securities and Exchange Commission when all internal procedural periods have run. The delisting became effective on January 21, 2026. As of the date of this Annual Report, the Companys common stock is traded on the OTCID Basic Market, under the symbol SYBX.
